visuals.title: Many-to-One Threading Model
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Many-to-One Threading Model
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Multithreading Models and Libraries</text>
  
  <!-- Many-to-One Model -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Many-to-One
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- One-to-One Model -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    One-to-One
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Many-to-Many Model -->
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Many-to-Many
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Pthreads Library -->
  <rect x="30" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Pthreads
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- OpenMP Library -->
  <rect x="160" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    OpenMP
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Java Threads -->
  <rect x="290" y="150" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Java Threads
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting arrows -->
  <line x1="80" y1="100" x2="80" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="100" x2="210" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="340" y1="100" x2="340" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Section labels -->
  <text x="210" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Threading Models
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Thread Libraries
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Additional libraries -->
  <rect x="30" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    .NET Tasks
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="160" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    GCD (Apple)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="290" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C++ Threads
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
